title: Ritual Magic
description: become a magician and shock your friends
body:
# Dependencies [Player Motion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/player_motion) # how to install ### mod install the mod and dependencies ### datapack put one copy into your datapacks folder **and** other copy in resource packs folder
please ensure you have the depedencies installed.
# what it does ritual magic adds rituals to become a magician. ## what types of magicians there are there are four types of magicians: lightning, fire, ice and air. ## what abillities do magicians have 1. lightning magicians can shoot lightning bolts when they do it they get strength, resistance, speed, haste, jump_boost for 2 seconds.
2. fire magicians can shoot fireballs, when fireball touches an entity it gets 5 damage, fireball leaves fire path below it, when fire magician shoots a fireball he gets fire ressistence for 2 seconds, when fire magician stands in fire he gets regeneration. 3. Ice magicians can shoot a snowflake, that freezes any entity it collides with. 4. Air magicians can jump very high in the direction they are facing. ## how to become a magician ### **fire magician** 1. place four item frames like so ![four item frames placed in a star shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8bd87fc9a5ef8764f614df1845926f223b89d.png) 2. fill them with diamond axe, redstone, fire charge, redstone, ender pearl![four items placed in four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a57e773708cd961389046122d292f7f5965357ef.png) 3. drop an end crystal![end crystal in center of ritual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3679356a096badadd8ffc73ec7e46f2be999c68f.png) 4. walk into the ritual ### **lightning magician** 1. place four item frames like so ![four item frames placed in a star shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8bd87fc9a5ef8764f614df1845926f223b89d.png) 2. fill them with diamond axe, redstone, lightning rod, redstone, ender pearl![four items placed in four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d28cb00f76ad6a5e0c1acdac23379e75959ce82.png) 3. drop an end crystal ![end crystal in center of four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31fa472bf60899635be066227394add2623364cb.png) 4. walk into the ritual ### **Ice magician** 1. place four item frames like so ![four item frames placed in a star shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8bd87fc9a5ef8764f614df1845926f223b89d.png) 2. fill them with diamond axe, redstone, Blue ice, redstone, ender pearl!![four items placed in four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3c5ccc2815e8c1a64cc3f9b877325bf6c11dba3_0.webp) 3. drop an end crystal
![end crystal in center of four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29068545600cb93d2491616587560fa2a5a975b2_0.webp) 4. walk into the ritual ### **Air magician** 1. place four item frames like so ![four item frames placed in a star shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8bd87fc9a5ef8764f614df1845926f223b89d.png) 2. fill them with diamond axe, redstone, Wind charge, redstone, ender pearl![wind charge...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb313cb73eb821306e66be91badb0b0233ac37f.png) 3. drop an end crystal
![end crystal...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c42bdd5be8cd084d393bff4a9fccd4ab95c89355.png) 4. walk into the ritual ## how to use abillities left click while holding magic stick ## how to get magic stick 1. place four item frames like so!![four item frames placed in a star shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea8bd87fc9a5ef8764f614df1845926f223b89d.png) 2. fill them with diamond axe, redstone, stick, redstone, ender pearl![four items placed in four item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d1b9fafc3a061d47d093c3b1413f30c9922a69b.png) 3. drop an end crystal![end crystal in center of ritual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93ca775cfd13cafff05bf563a16444606519e931.png) 4. walk into the ritual
